theme_and_archetype.archetype: Heritage Luxury (Mix of Organic Earthy & Jewel Luxury)
e1_design_principles: No generic Bootstrap components without heavy customization. Override shadows and borders.
Use ample negative space (padding: 4rem to 6rem on sections).
Headings must feel editorial and elegant, never corporate.
Asymmetry in image layouts. Use bento grids or overlapping containers where appropriate.

buttons.primary: background: #C9A84C; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #C9A84C; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 28px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
buttons.secondary: background: transparent; color: #1A3A5C; border: 1px solid #1A3A5C; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 28px; transition: all 0.3s ease;

cards.general: border: none; background: #fff; border-radius: 0; padding: 0; overflow: hidden;
cards.hover_effect: transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 15px 30px rgba(26, 58, 92, 0.1); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1);

navbar.style: sticky-top; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 2px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 0.3s ease;
navbar.links: font-family: 'Inter'; font-weight: 500; color: #1A3A5C; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.9rem;

whatsapp_button.style: position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; background: #25D366; color: white; width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 30px; z-index: 1000; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);

hero_slider.overlay: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(26, 58, 92, 0.4); z-index: 1;
hero_slider.text_content: position: relative; z-index: 2; color: #fff; text-align: center;

animations.custom_keyframes: @keyframes pulse-whatsapp { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.7); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(37, 211, 102, 0); } }

hero.description: Heritage Interior - Warm sunlight and elegant decor
Indian family walking on beach at evening
Hotel room beach view through sheer curtains

rooms.description: White and blue beach view from window

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, links MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link').

tech_stack_rules.framework: Pure HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JS. NO REACT.
tech_stack_rules.css: Bootstrap 5.3 CDN for grid/utilities. style.css for custom overrides and specific component styling.
tech_stack_rules.js: main.js for initializing Swiper, Lightbox, AOS, and custom DOM logic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color codes provided. Do NOT deviate to other shades.
Implement the layout entirely using Bootstrap 5.3 utilities (d-flex, g-4, py-5, etc.) and semantic HTML.
Include a common CSS file `/css/style.css` and JS file `/js/main.js` across all 7 pages.
Use Swiper.js for the hero section with effect 'fade' and autoplay enabled.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button is present on all 7 pages, fixed at the bottom right.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (links, buttons, form fields).
All images MUST be populated with the media URLs provided in this JSON. DO NOT use placeholder services.
Maintain the Playfair Display + Inter font combination as requested, giving it an elegant, high-end feel.
